scene:switch_circuit_diagram.object_description: a mixed branch battery circuit with five labeled bulbs and visibly open or closed switches

query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around every bulb symbol that will be on; use [] if no bulbs will be on
query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of bulbs that will be on as an integer
